subject: ████████
body:
Tiffany added you as a friend on Facebook.  We need to confirm that you know Tiffany in order for you to be friends on Facebook.

To confirm this friend request, follow the link below: 
http://www.facebook.com/n/?reqs.php

Thanks,
The Facebook Team
